caption: Clipboard Activity
description: Clipboard Activity events report when a process performs an action on the system clipboard.
name: clipboard_activity

1.caption: Clear
1.description: All data was removed from the clipboard.

2.caption: Copy
2.description: A process has written data to the clipboard.

3.caption: Paste
3.description: A process has read data from the clipboard.

source_process.description: For a paste activity,  the process which copied the data to the clipboard.

clipboard_items.description: The data items written to, or read from, the clipboard.
